one_line_ask: Take today's exported promo key frames + the provided voice-over, apply one consistent lively color grade across the frames, build a YouTube thumbnail from the hero shot, source a royalty-free music bed, clean the VO, generate a sizzle cut and a content summary, and drop the finished, organized package back in the daily folder — same day.
brief: Fresh promotional footage and a voice-over land in the shared drive each afternoon and the finished, post-ready package must go back in the same folder within 24 hours. For today's spot the client exported five representative key frames from the raw clips (hero close-up, two mid-shots, an environment/wide, and a product/detail shot), all shot in mixed afternoon lighting so they look uneven and slightly cool. They also dropped a raw voice-over WAV (room tone + a little hiss) and want a music bed sourced for them. Deliver a same-day "promo finishing package": (1) all five key frames carrying ONE consistent, lively-but-tasteful grade — auto-tone baseline, warmer temperature, lifted shadows, controlled highlights, a touch more vibrance, plus the same Lightroom look-preset on every frame so the set feels edited together and "accessible, not corporate"; (2) a 1920x1080 YouTube/social thumbnail built from the graded hero frame (subject popped from the busy background via a blurred-background treatment, then cropped to 16:9 with the subject weighted left so a title can sit right); (3) a licensed royalty-free music-bed candidate from Adobe Stock (full-res licensed file, upbeat/accessible);
